---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve SolaSim
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- **Browser** (for web interface issues): [e.g. Chrome 120, Edge 120]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, iPadOS 17]
- **Microcontroller**: [e.g. RP2040, ESP32-S3]
- **MicroPython version**: [e.g. v1.27.0]
- **Connection type**: [USB / BLE]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
